Title: Vendor Registration with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User has an Android device with the app installed.
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., seller1@example.com), strong password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!), store name (e.g., "EcoMart"), store address (e.g., "Via Roma 1, Venezia"), store description (e.g., "Organic grocery store"), store category (e.g., "Organic"), store opening hours (e.g., "9:00-20:00"), store contact number (e.g., "3456789012").
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Registrati come Venditore."
2. Enter the email address in the "Email" field.
3. Enter the password in the "Password" field.
4. Re-enter the password in the "Conferma Password" field.
5. Enter the store name in the "Nome Negozio" field.
6. Enter the store address in the "Indirizzo" field.
7. Enter the store description in the "Descrizione" field.
8. Select the store category from the dropdown menu.
9. Enter the store opening hours in the "Orario Apertura" field.
10. Enter the store contact number in the "Telefono" field.
11. Click on the "Registrati" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the input fields, confirms registration success, and redirects the user to the vendor login screen.

Title: Vendor Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: A vendor account is already registered in the system.
Test Data: Registered vendor email (e.g., seller1@example.com), correct password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!).
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Accedi."
2. Select "Accedi come Venditore."
3. Enter the registered email in the "Email" field.
4. Enter the correct password in the "Password" field.
5. Click on the "Accedi" button.
Expected Result: The system authenticates the user and redirects them to the vendor dashboard.

Title: Vendor Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: A vendor account is already registered in the system.
Test Data: Registered vendor email (e.g., seller1@example.com), incorrect password (e.g., wrongpass).
Test Steps:
1. Open the app and select "Accedi."
2. Select "Accedi come Venditore."
3. Enter the registered email in the "Email" field.
4. Enter an incorrect password in the "Password" field.
5. Click on the "Accedi" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message "Credenziali errate. Riprova" and does not redirect the user.

Title: Vendor Profile Update with Valid Information
Preconditions: A vendor is logged into the system.
Test Data: Updated store name (e.g., "EcoMart Premium"), updated store address (e.g., "Via Roma 2, Venezia"), updated store description (e.g., "Premium organic grocery store"), updated store category (e.g., "Premium Organic"), updated store opening hours (e.g., "8:00-21:00"), updated store contact number (e.g., "3456789013").
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a vendor.
2. Navigate to the "Gestione Profilo" section.
3. Click on "Modifica Profilo."
4. Update the store name in the "Nome Negozio" field.
5. Update the store address in the "Indirizzo" field.
6. Update the store description in the "Descrizione" field.
7. Select the updated store category from the dropdown menu.
8. Update the store opening hours in the "Orario Apertura" field.
9. Update the store contact number in the "Telefono" field.
10. Click on the "Salva Modifiche" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the updated information, confirms the changes, and updates the vendor profile.

Title: Publish a New Product with Valid Details
Preconditions: A vendor is logged into the system.
Test Data: Product name (e.g., "Organic Apples"), product description (e.g., "Fresh organic apples"), product category (e.g., "Fruit"), product price (e.g., 2.50), product quantity (e.g., 50), product image (upload a valid image file), product sustainability rating (e.g., 5/5), product expiration date (e.g., 2025-06-30), product nutritional information (e.g., "High in fiber").
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a vendor.
2. Navigate to the "Pubblicazione Prodotti" section.
3. Click on "Aggiungi Nuovo Prodotto."
4. Enter the product name in the "Nome Prodotto" field.
5. Enter the product description in the "Descrizione" field.
6. Select the product category from the dropdown menu.
7. Enter the product price in the "Prezzo" field.
8. Enter the product quantity in the "Quantità" field.
9. Upload a product image by clicking on "Carica Immagine" and selecting a valid image file.
10. Select the product sustainability rating from the dropdown menu.
11. Enter the product expiration date in the "Data Scadenza" field.
12. Enter the product nutritional information in the "Informazioni Nutrizionali" field.
13. Click on the "Pubblica Prodotto" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the product details, confirms the publication, and adds the product to the vendor's store listing.

Title: Update an Existing Product with Valid Details
Preconditions: A vendor has already published a product in the system.
Test Data: Updated product name (e.g., "Organic Apples - Premium"), updated product description (e.g., "Fresh organic apples, locally sourced"), updated product price (e.g., 3.00), updated product quantity (e.g., 45), updated product sustainability rating (e.g., 4/5), updated product expiration date (e.g., 2025-07-15).
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a vendor.
2. Navigate to the "Aggiornamento Prodotti" section.
3. Select the product to update from the list.
4. Update the product name in the "Nome Prodotto" field.
5. Update the product description in the "Descrizione" field.
6. Update the product price in the "Prezzo" field.
7. Update the product quantity in the "Quantità" field.
8. Select the updated product sustainability rating from the dropdown menu.
9. Update the product expiration date in the "Data Scadenza" field.
10. Click on the "Salva Modifiche" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the updated product details, confirms the changes, and updates the product information in the vendor's store listing.

Title: Submit a Report for a Product
Preconditions: A vendor is logged into the system and has at least one published product.
Test Data: Report description (e.g., "Product image is outdated"), product ID (e.g., 101).
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a vendor.
2. Navigate to the "Gestione Segnalazioni" section.
3. Select the product to report from the list.
4. Enter the report description in the "Descrizione Segnalazione" field.
5. Click on the "Invia Segnalazione" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the report, confirms submission, and notifies the vendor that the report has been sent for review.

Title: Add a Promotion for a Product
Preconditions: A vendor is logged into the system and has at least one published product.
Test Data: Promotion name (e.g., "Summer Sale"), promotion description (e.g., "20% off on all organic products"), promotion start date (e.g., 2025-06-01), promotion end date (e.g., 2025-06-30), discount percentage (e.g., 20), product ID (e.g., 101).
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a vendor.
2. Navigate to the "Aggiunta Promozioni/Offerte" section.
3. Click on "Aggiungi Nuova Promozione."
4. Enter the promotion name in the "Nome Promozione" field.
5. Enter the promotion description in the "Descrizione" field.
6. Enter the promotion start date in the "Data Inizio" field.
7. Enter the promotion end date in the "Data Fine" field.
8. Enter the discount percentage in the "Sconto" field.
9. Select the product(s) to apply the promotion to from the list.
10. Click on the "Aggiungi Promozione" button.
Expected Result: The system validates the promotion details, confirms the addition, and applies the promotion to the selected product(s).

Title: View Customer Reviews for a Product
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one customer review for a product.
Test Data:
A product with existing reviews (e.g., 3 reviews with ratings 4, 5, and 2 stars).
Review comments: "Great product!", "Works as expected", "Poor quality".
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the product page for which reviews exist.
3. The seller selects the "Visualizza recensioni" (View Reviews) option.
4. The system displays a list of reviews for the selected product.
Expected Result:
The list of reviews is displayed, sorted by date or rating.
Each review shows a rating (1-5 stars) and a comment.
The seller can scroll through all available reviews.

Title: View No Reviews Available Message
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
No customer reviews exist for the selected product or store.
Test Data: A product with no reviews.
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the product page with no reviews.
3. The seller selects the "Visualizza recensioni" (View Reviews) option.
Expected Result: The system displays a message: "Non ci sono recensioni disponibili" (No reviews available).

Title: Flag Inappropriate Review
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one review marked as inappropriate by the seller.
Test Data: A review with a comment: "This product is fake and scam."
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the product page with reviews.
3. The seller selects the "Visualizza recensioni" (View Reviews) option.
4. The seller identifies an inappropriate review and selects the "Segnala" (Report) option.
Expected Result:
The review is flagged for revision by the app administrator.
A confirmation message appears: "La recensione è stata segnalata per revisione" (The review has been reported for review).

Title: View Customer Complaints
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one customer complaint about a product or store.
Test Data: A complaint: "Product received is different from the description."
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Gestione segnalazioni" (Complaint Management) section.
3. The system displays a list of complaints.
Expected Result:
The list of complaints is displayed.
Each complaint includes a description of the issue.
The seller can view all complaints in one list.

Title: Respond to a Customer Complaint
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one unresolved customer complaint.
Test Data: A complaint: "Product arrived damaged."
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Gestione segnalazioni" (Complaint Management) section.
3. The seller selects a complaint to view its details.
4. The seller types a response: "We apologize for the inconvenience. Please contact our support for a replacement."
5. The seller selects the "Rispondi" (Reply) option.
Expected Result:
The response is saved and associated with the complaint.
The complaint status is updated to "In lavorazione" (In progress).
A confirmation message appears: "Risposta inviata con successo" (Response sent successfully).

Title: Mark Complaint as Unfounded
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one complaint marked as unfounded.
Test Data: A complaint: "Product works fine, but I want a refund."
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Gestione segnalazioni" (Complaint Management) section.
3. The seller selects a complaint and marks it as "Infondata" (Unfounded).
Expected Result:
The complaint is marked as unfounded.
A confirmation message appears: "Segnalazione contrassegnata come infondata" (Complaint marked as unfounded).
The seller can optionally request an investigation by the app administrator.

Title: View No Complaints Available Message
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
No customer complaints exist.
Test Data: No complaints in the system.
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Gestione segnalazioni" (Complaint Management) section.
Expected Result: The system displays a message: "Non ci sono segnalazioni disponibili" (No complaints available).

Title: Create a New Promotion
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one product in the seller’s catalog.
Test Data:
Product: "Wireless Headphones"
Promotion details: Name: "Summer Sale", Description: "20% off", Discount: 20%, Start Date: 2024-06-01, End Date: 2024-06-30.
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Aggiungi promozione/offerta" (Add Promotion/Offer) section.
3. The seller fills in the promotion details:
Name: "Summer Sale"
Description: "20% off"
Products included: "Wireless Headphones"
Discount: 20%
Start Date: 2024-06-01
End Date: 2024-06-30
4. The seller selects the "Salva" (Save) option.
Expected Result:
The promotion is saved and published.
A confirmation message appears: "Promozione salvata con successo" (Promotion saved successfully).
The promotion is visible in the "Offerte" (Offers) section and on the product page.

Title: Cancel Promotion Creation
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
The seller is in the process of creating a promotion.
Test Data: Partially filled promotion form.
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Aggiungi promozione/offerta" (Add Promotion/Offer) section.
3. The seller starts filling in the promotion details but does not complete all fields.
4. The seller selects the "Annulla" (Cancel) option.
Expected Result:
The promotion creation process is canceled.
No promotion is saved.
A confirmation message appears: "Creazione promozione annullata" (Promotion creation canceled).

Title: Error Message for Incomplete Promotion Form
Preconditions: The seller must be authenticated in the application.
Test Data: Promotion form with missing required fields (e.g., no name or discount).
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Aggiungi promozione/offerta" (Add Promotion/Offer) section.
3. The seller attempts to save the promotion without filling in the required fields (e.g., no name or discount).
Expected Result:
The system displays an error message: "Inserire le informazioni mancanti" (Insert missing information).
The seller cannot save the promotion until all required fields are completed.

Title: Promotion Auto-Disabled After End Date
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
A promotion is active with an end date in the past.
Test Data: Promotion: "Summer Sale" (End Date: 2024-05-31, current date: 2024-06-01).
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller navigates to the "Offerte" (Offers) section.
Expected Result:
The promotion is no longer visible to consumers.
The promotion is marked as inactive in the seller’s promotion list.

Title: View Notifications
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one unread notification.
Test Data: Notifications: "New review for Product X", "New complaint about Product Y".
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller selects the "Notifiche" (Notifications) icon/section.
3. The system displays a list of notifications.
Expected Result:
The list of notifications is displayed in chronological order.
Unread notifications are highlighted.
The seller can view the details of each notification.

Title: Mark Notification as Read
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one unread notification.
Test Data: Unread notification: "New review for Product X".
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller selects the "Notifiche" (Notifications) icon/section.
3. The seller selects a notification to mark it as read.
Expected Result:
The notification is marked as read.
The notification is removed from the unread list or visually indicated as read.

Title: Delete Notification
Preconditions:
The seller must be authenticated in the application.
There must be at least one notification.
Test Data: Notification: "Old complaint about Product Y".
Test Steps:
1. The seller logs into the application.
2. The seller selects the "Notifiche" (Notifications) icon/section.
3. The seller selects a notification and chooses the "Elimina" (Delete) option.
Expected Result:
The notification is deleted from the list.
A confirmation message appears: "Notifica eliminata" (Notification deleted).

Title: Successful User Registration

Test Data: Valid email, password, name, surname
Test Steps:
1. User selects "Registrati" option.
2. User fills in registration form with valid data.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: New account is created, and user is redirected to login screen.

Title: Login with Incorrect Credentials

1. User selects "Accedi" option.
2. User enters incorrect email and/or password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: App displays an error message and prompts user to correct the data.

2. User enters correct email and password.

Title: View Profile Information
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has an existing account.
Test Data: None
Test Steps: 1. User selects "Profilo" or "Gestisci profilo" from the main menu.
Expected Result: User’s profile information (name, surname, email, etc.) is displayed correctly.

Title: Edit Profile Information
Preconditions: User is authenticated and logged in.
Test Data: Updated name, surname, email, address

2. User modifies one or more fields (e.g., name, email).
3. User selects "Salva" to confirm changes.

Title: Cancel Profile Edit Without Saving

Test Data: None

Title: Save Profile with Missing Required Field

Expected Result: App displays an error message and prevents saving until the required field is corrected.

Title: Search for Nearby Stores by Keyword
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.
Test Data: Keyword "supermercato"
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the search function via the search bar or "Cerca negozi/prodotti" menu.
2. User enters "supermercato" as the search term.
3. User submits the search.
Expected Result: App displays a list of relevant stores and their locations on a map, prioritizing nearby results.

Title: Apply Filters to Store Search
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.
Test Data: Filter criteria: "promozioni attive," "distanza < 5 km"
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the search function.
2. User enters a keyword (e.g., "frutta").
3. User applies filters for "promozioni attive" and "distanza < 5 km."
4. User submits the search.
Expected Result: App displays only stores with active promotions within 5 km.

Title: No Results for Store Search
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.
Test Data: Rare keyword (e.g., "negozio di cactus esotici")
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the search function.
2. User enters an uncommon keyword.
3. User submits the search.
Expected Result: App displays a message suggesting the user broaden the search criteria.

Title: View Stores on Map and List
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User selects "Visualizza negozi" from the main screen.
2. User toggles between map and list view.
Expected Result: App displays stores as pins on the map or in a scrollable list with distance and promotion indicators.

Title: View Store Details from Map or List
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User selects "Visualizza negozi."
2. User taps on a store pin (map) or store entry (list).
Expected Result: App opens a detailed store card with address, opening hours, products, reviews, promotions, and contact info.

Title: No Stores Found in Selected Area
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and geolocation is enabled.

Test Steps:
1. User selects "Visualizza negozi."
2. User manually adjusts location to an area with no stores.
3. User submits the search.
Expected Result: App informs the user of no stores found and suggests nearby areas.

Title: Sort Products by Price or Popularity
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and a store with products is selected.
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User selects a store or accesses the "Prodotti" section.
2. User selects "Ordina per prezzo" (ascending/descending) or "Ordina per popolarità."
Expected Result: Products are sorted according to the selected criterion.

Title: No Products Found After Filtering
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and a store with products is selected.
Test Data: Overly restrictive filters (e.g., "biologico," "vegano," "prezzo < 1 €")
Test Steps:
1. User selects a store or accesses the "Prodotti" section.
2. User applies overly restrictive filters.
3. User submits the filters.
Expected Result: App displays a message offering to modify the search criteria.

Title: Leave a Rating and Comment for a Store
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and has interacted with a store.
Test Data: Rating: 4 stars, comment: "Buon servizio, prodotti freschi"
Test Steps:
1. User selects a store and chooses "Lascia una recensione."
2. User selects a rating (e.g., 4 stars).
3. User enters a comment.
4. User submits the review.
Expected Result: Review is published, and the store’s average rating is updated.

Title: Cancel Review Submission
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and has interacted with a store.
Test Data: None
Test Steps:
1. User selects a store and chooses "Lascia una recensione."
2. User selects a rating but does not enter a comment.
3. User selects "Annulla" before submitting.
Expected Result: Review is not submitted, and user returns to the store details screen.

Title: Modify or Delete an Existing Review
Preconditions: User is authenticated, internet is active, and has previously submitted a review.
Test Data: Existing review data

Expected Result: Data deleted within 30 days; no residual data in system logs

Title: Verify Food Label Compliance
Preconditions: Store products listed in the app
Test Data: Sample product with nutritional info (e.g., calories, ingredients)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to a store’s product list
2. Verify nutritional labels match regulatory standards (e.g., EU food labeling laws)
Expected Result: All labels comply with current regulations; no discrepancies found

Title: Verify User Reporting of False Product Information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to a vendor’s product listing marked as "sustainable" or "organic" but is suspected of being false.
Test Data: A product listing with incorrect sustainability claims (e.g., "100% organic" but contains non-organic ingredients).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the vendor’s product page.
2. User selects the "Report" option for the product.
3. User fills out the report form with details: "Product claims to be organic but contains non-organic ingredients."
4. User submits the report.
Expected Result: Report is logged in the system and sent to moderators for review. User receives a confirmation message.

Title: Verify Vendor Declaration Accuracy Validation
Preconditions: Vendor is logged in and attempting to update product information.
Test Data: A product description with false claims (e.g., "Zero waste packaging" but packaging is not recyclable).
Test Steps:
1. Vendor navigates to the product editing section.
2. Vendor submits a product description with false sustainability claims.
3. System validates the declaration (e.g., cross-checks with provided documentation or flags inconsistencies).
Expected Result: System rejects the submission with an error message: "Invalid declaration. Provide proof of sustainability claims." Vendor cannot publish the product until accurate information is provided.

Title: Verify Moderator Review of False User Reports
Preconditions: A false user report is submitted about a vendor’s product, and a moderator is logged in.
Test Data: A report stating "This product is not vegan" when the product is actually vegan (false report).
Test Steps:
1. Moderator logs in to the moderation dashboard.
2. Moderator reviews the report and verifies the product’s actual status.
3. Moderator marks the report as "False" and selects the option to issue a warning to the reporting user.
Expected Result: System sends a warning notification to the user: "False report detected. Further false reports may result in account suspension." Report is archived as resolved.

Title: Verify Moderator Review of False Vendor Declarations
Preconditions: A vendor submits false product information, and a moderator is logged in.
Test Data: A vendor claims "100% locally sourced" but provides no proof or evidence.
Test Steps:
1. Moderator logs in to the moderation dashboard.
2. Moderator reviews the vendor’s declaration and finds no supporting evidence.
3. Moderator flags the declaration as "False" and selects the option to suspend the vendor’s account temporarily.
Expected Result: System suspends the vendor’s account with a notification: "Your declaration was found false. Account suspended for 7 days. Resubmit accurate information to appeal." Vendor receives an email with suspension details.

Title: Verify App Installation on Minimum Android Version
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android device with API level 27 (Android 8.1) and 1GB RAM.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to download the EcoFood app from the Play Store.
2. User installs the app on a device with Android 8.1 and 1GB RAM.
3. User opens the app.
Expected Result: App installs successfully without errors. App launches and runs without crashes or performance issues.

Title: Verify App Installation Failure on Unsupported Android Version
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android device with API level 26 (Android 8.0) and 1GB RAM.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to download the EcoFood app from the Play Store.
2. User installs the app on a device with Android 8.0.
3. User attempts to open the app.
Expected Result: App installation fails with an error message: "Your device does not meet the minimum requirements (Android 8.1 or higher)." App does not launch.

Title: Verify App Functionality with Stable Internet Connection
Preconditions: Device has a stable internet connection (e.g., Wi-Fi or 4G with strong signal).
Test Data: User attempting to load product listings or submit a report.
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app with a stable internet connection.
2. User navigates to the product listings section.
3. User submits a report about a product.
Expected Result: Product listings load within 3 seconds. Report is submitted successfully without timeout errors. User receives a confirmation message.

Title: Verify App Behavior with Weak Internet Connection
Preconditions: Device has a weak internet connection (e.g., 1x signal or slow Wi-Fi).
Test Data: User attempting to load product listings or submit a report.
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app with a weak internet connection.
2. User attempts to load product listings.
3. User attempts to submit a report.
Expected Result: App displays a warning: "Weak connection detected. Some features may not work properly." Product listings load with delays or partial data. Report submission fails with an error: "Connection unstable. Please check your internet and retry."
